comments: Broadcast over 3 hours, the first hour (9PM-10PM) in mono on Medium Wave covering chart positions 30 to 10, whilst the remaining two hours (10PM-12AM) are in Stereo on FM covering chart positions 9 to 1.
Last part of Fifth Birthday show. Some of TV’s links have been edited.
New recording of the show thanks to Tim Tearle. C90 begins with Yes and ends halfway through Genesis. Tape flips during Rush. Much higher quality recording than the previous version available.
Download 3 is part of the first hour broadcast on MW in Mono, only Grendel by Marillion is missing. Restored in download 4.

track_listing.details: FRS recorded live at Reading Rock 1983

'The Number Of The Beast' (LP-The Number Of The Beast) EMI

LP-One More From The Road; MCA
